title: Executive Order 10311—Suspending Certain Statutory Provisions Relating to Employment in the Canal Zone

flags.justification: A narrow, specific suspension under statutory authority, with an explicit proviso preserving compensation-related protections.
A clear, specific suspension tied to named statutory provisions.
A statutory suspension, not a compliance regime.
No compliance regime is created by this order.
The suspension is tied to specific annual appropriations acts (FY1952), implicitly bounded to that appropriations period.
The order explicitly preserves the compensation-related provisions of the suspended sections, a real protective limitation.
No compliance regime is created by this order.
A narrow, technical, bounded suspension of specific appropriations-act provisions.
No second agency's competing mandate is implicated.
This order is itself the suspension rather than a carve-out from a broader regulatory scheme.
